CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Dismissal Per Ccp Secs 187 And 664.6
Off Calendar Jul-27-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF GREAT EASTERN ENTERTAINMENT CO.'s Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Notice of Settlement of Entire Case.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Great Eastern Entertainment Co.'s unopposed motion to set aside and vacate notice of settlement of entire case is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is continued to July 27, 2022 on the Court's Own Motion.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
